---
title: "IWG 3_4_2026"
author: "Elizabeth Campbell"
date: "2026-03-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
## ============================================================
## IWG Allele × BioClim Boxplots
## ============================================================

library(vcfR)
library(tidyverse)

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 0. File paths
# ----------------------------------------------------------
vcf_path     <- "C:/Users/Lizzy/OneDrive/Documents/UH_Manoa_Classes/IWG_Chapter_2/Data/Processed_Data/IWG_PI.vcf"
bioclim_path <- "C:/Users/Lizzy/OneDrive/Documents/UH_Manoa_Classes/IWG_Chapter_2/Data/Phenotype_and_Ecographic_Data/IWG_bioclim.csv"
out_dir      <- "C:/Users/Lizzy/OneDrive/Documents/UH_Manoa_Classes/IWG_Chapter_2/Manuscript/Tables/"

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Define 10 sig SNPs and their BioClim associations
# ----------------------------------------------------------
snp_bioclim <- tibble(
  SNP = c(
    "SV01_504887537", "SV05_83807981",  "SV07_374076699",
    "SJ07_471063769", "SJ01_223693185", "SJ01_285040967",
    "SS01_212548100", "SV01_522436644", "SV03_332992142",
    "SJ05_446284944"
  ),
  BioClim_vars = c(
    "wc2.1_30s_bio_4,wc2.1_30s_bio_7",
    "wc2.1_30s_bio_4",
    "wc2.1_30s_bio_9",
    "wc2.1_30s_bio_14,wc2.1_30s_bio_17",
    "wc2.1_30s_bio_15",
    "wc2.1_30s_bio_4,wc2.1_30s_bio_7",
    "wc2.1_30s_bio_15",
    "wc2.1_30s_bio_4,wc2.1_30s_bio_15",
    "wc2.1_30s_bio_3",
    "wc2.1_30s_bio_14,wc2.1_30s_bio_17"
  )
)

sig_snps <- snp_bioclim$SNP

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Read VCF and subset to sig SNPs
# ----------------------------------------------------------
vcf <- read.vcfR(vcf_path, verbose = TRUE)

fixed_df <- as.data.frame(getFIX(vcf), stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(SNP_ID = if_else(!is.na(ID) & ID != ".", ID,
                           paste0(CHROM, "_", POS)))

snp_idx <- which(fixed_df$SNP_ID %in% sig_snps)

if (length(snp_idx) == 0) {
  snp_pos <- str_extract(sig_snps, "(?<=_)\\d+$")
  snp_idx <- which(fixed_df$POS %in% snp_pos)
  message("Matched ", length(snp_idx), " SNPs by position fallback.")
}

stopifnot("No sig SNPs found — check SNP ID format in VCF" = length(snp_idx) > 0)

vcf_sub   <- vcf[snp_idx, ]
fixed_sub <- fixed_df[snp_idx, ]

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Convert GT codes to nucleotides
# ----------------------------------------------------------
gt_matrix <- extract.gt(vcf_sub, element = "GT", as.numeric = FALSE)

allele_list <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(gt_matrix)), function(i) {
  ref         <- fixed_sub$REF[i]
  alt_alleles <- str_split(fixed_sub$ALT[i], ",")[[1]]
  all_alleles <- c(ref, alt_alleles)

  sapply(gt_matrix[i, ], function(gt) {
    if (is.na(gt) || gt %in% c("./.", ".|.")) return(NA_character_)
    codes <- as.integer(str_split(gt, "[/|]")[[1]])
    nucs  <- all_alleles[codes + 1]
    paste(sort(unique(nucs)), collapse = "/")
  })
})

allele_df           <- as.data.frame(do.call(rbind, allele_list))
rownames(allele_df) <- fixed_sub$SNP_ID
colnames(allele_df) <- colnames(gt_matrix)

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 4. Write wide allele state table
# ----------------------------------------------------------
allele_wide <- allele_df %>%
  rownames_to_column("SNP") %>%
  left_join(snp_bioclim, by = "SNP") %>%
  relocate(BioClim_vars, .after = SNP)

write.csv(allele_wide,
          file.path(out_dir, "allele_states.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

message("allele_states.csv written: ", nrow(allele_wide), " SNPs x ",
        ncol(allele_wide) - 2, " individuals")

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Read BioClim CSV
# ----------------------------------------------------------
bioclim <- read.csv(bioclim_path, check.names = FALSE)

bioclim_long <- bioclim %>%
  rename(accession = PI_Accession) %>%
  select(accession, starts_with("wc2.1_30s_bio_")) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = starts_with("wc2.1_30s_bio_"),
    names_to  = "bioclim_var",
    values_to = "bioclim_value"
  )

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Build long-format master table
# ----------------------------------------------------------
allele_long <- allele_df %>%
  rownames_to_column("SNP") %>%
  pivot_longer(-SNP, names_to = "accession", values_to = "allele") %>%
  filter(!is.na(allele))

snp_bioclim_long <- snp_bioclim %>%
  separate_rows(BioClim_vars, sep = ",") %>%
  rename(bioclim_var = BioClim_vars) %>%
  mutate(bioclim_var = str_trim(bioclim_var))

combined <- allele_long %>%
  inner_join(snp_bioclim_long, by = "SNP", relationship = "many-to-many") %>%
  inner_join(bioclim_long,     by = c("accession", "bioclim_var")) %>%
  mutate(
    bio_label = str_replace(bioclim_var, "wc2.1_30s_bio_(\\d+)", "BIO\\1"),
    SNP_label = paste0(SNP, "\n(", bio_label, ")")
  )

write.csv(combined %>% select(-SNP_label, -bio_label),
          file.path(out_dir, "allele_bioclim_long.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

message("allele_bioclim_long.csv written: ", nrow(combined), " rows")

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 7. Allele summary table
# ----------------------------------------------------------
allele_summary <- combined %>%
  group_by(SNP, bioclim_var, allele) %>%
  summarise(
    n      = n(),
    median = median(bioclim_value, na.rm = TRUE),
    mean   = mean(bioclim_value,   na.rm = TRUE),
    sd     = sd(bioclim_value,     na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(SNP, bioclim_var, desc(median))

write.csv(allele_summary,
          file.path(out_dir, "allele_summary_sorted.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

message("allele_summary_sorted.csv written")

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 8. Individual boxplots — one PNG per SNP x BioClim combo
# ----------------------------------------------------------
plot_dir <- file.path(out_dir, "SNP_boxplots")
dir.create(plot_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

bioclim_ylabs <- c(
  "wc2.1_30s_bio_3"  = "Isothermality (BIO3, ratio x 100)",
  "wc2.1_30s_bio_4"  = "Temperature Seasonality (BIO4, SD x 100)",
  "wc2.1_30s_bio_7"  = "Temperature Annual Range (BIO7, degrees C x 10)",
  "wc2.1_30s_bio_9"  = "Mean Temp of Driest Quarter (BIO9, degrees C x 10)",
  "wc2.1_30s_bio_14" = "Precipitation of Driest Month (BIO14, mm)",
  "wc2.1_30s_bio_15" = "Precipitation Seasonality (BIO15, CV)",
  "wc2.1_30s_bio_17" = "Precipitation of Driest Quarter (BIO17, mm)"
)

snp_combos <- combined %>%
  distinct(SNP, bioclim_var, SNP_label, bio_label)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(snp_combos))) {

  snp_i       <- snp_combos$SNP[i]
  bioclim_i   <- snp_combos$bioclim_var[i]
  bio_label_i <- snp_combos$bio_label[i]
  ylab_i      <- bioclim_ylabs[bioclim_i]

  plot_data <- combined %>%
    filter(SNP == snp_i, bioclim_var == bioclim_i)

  
  n_lab <- plot_data %>%
    group_by(allele) %>%
    summarise(n = n(), y_pos = min(bioclim_value, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(label = paste0("n=", n))

  p_i <- ggplot(plot_data,
                aes(x = allele, y = bioclim_value, fill = allele)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.size  = 0.8,
                 outlier.alpha = 0.5,
                 width         = 0.55) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.15, size = 0.8, alpha = 0.4, color = "gray25") +
    geom_text(data = n_lab,
              aes(x = allele, y = y_pos, label = label),
              vjust = 1.4, size = 3, inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_x_discrete(drop = TRUE) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "BuGn") +
    labs(
  title    = NULL,
  subtitle = NULL,
  x        = "Allele",
  y        = ylab_i
)+
    theme_bw(base_size = 14) +
    theme(
      legend.position  = "none",
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.title.y     = element_text(size = 12)
    )

  filename_i <- paste0(snp_i, "_", bio_label_i, ".png")

  ggsave(
    filename = file.path(plot_dir, filename_i),
    plot     = p_i,
    width    = 5,
    height   = 4.5,
    dpi      = 300,
    device   = "png"
  )

  message("Saved: ", filename_i)
}

message("All individual SNP plots saved to: ", plot_dir)

# ----------------------------------------------------------
# 9. Supplemental accession tables — one CSV per SNP
# ----------------------------------------------------------
supp_dir <- file.path(out_dir, "Supplemental_Accession_Tables")
dir.create(supp_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

for (snp_i in unique(combined$SNP)) {

  supp_data <- combined %>%
    filter(SNP == snp_i) %>%
    select(accession, SNP, allele, bioclim_var, bioclim_value) %>%
    mutate(bioclim_var = str_replace(bioclim_var,
                                     "wc2.1_30s_bio_(\\d+)", "BIO\\1")) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from  = bioclim_var,
                values_from = bioclim_value) %>%
    arrange(allele, accession)

  write.csv(supp_data,
            file.path(supp_dir, paste0("Supp_accessions_", snp_i, ".csv")),
            row.names = FALSE)

  message("Saved supplemental table for: ", snp_i)
}

message("All done. Outputs written to: ", out_dir)
```
